case_title: CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION VS. KATYA PAIZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT; CAUSE OF ACTION AND COMMON COUNTS; NOTICE TO PLNTF'S ALSO BY MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORPORATION SERVED MAY-26-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PAIZ, KATYA
